title: Fighter Jet Takeoff
body: The F-35B Lightning II is a short-takeoff and vertical landing fighter jet. It does a vertical takeoff to $$20.00-m$$ height above the ground and then follows a flight path angled at $$30$$ degrees with respect to the ground for $$20.00$$ km. Take $$\hat{i}$$ horizontal and $$\hat{j}$$ vertical.
lesson: 4. Motion in Two and Three Dimensions
